debug_info.goal:
f g : ℝ → ℝ
h₀ : ∀ (x y : ℝ), f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y
h₁ : ¬∀ (x : ℝ), f x = 0
h₂ : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f x| ≤ 1
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), |g x| ≤ 1

proof:
intro y
  let M := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hM_bdd : BddAbove (Set.range fun x => |f x|) := ⟨1, Set.forall_mem_range.mpr h₂⟩
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    obtain ⟨z, hz⟩ := not_forall.mp h₁
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hz).trans_le (le_ciSup hM_bdd z)
  have hg_le : ∀ x, |f x| * |g y| ≤ M := fun x => by
    have h : |2 * f x * g y| ≤ 2 * M := by
      rw [← h₀ x y]
      calc |f (x + y) + f (x - y)|
        _ ≤ |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| := abs_add _ _
        _ ≤ M + M := add_le_add (le_ciSup hM_bdd (x + y)) (le_ciSup hM_bdd (x - y))
        _ = 2 * M := (two_mul M).symm
    have h1 : |2 * f x * g y| = 2 * (|f x| * |g y|) := by
      rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (zero_lt_two : (0 : ℝ) < 2), mul_assoc]
    exact (mul_le_mul_left (zero_lt_two : (0 : ℝ) < 2)).mp (h1.symm.trans_le h)
  have hMg : M * |g y| ≤ M := by
    by_cases hgy : |g y| = 0
    · rw [hgy, mul_zero]; exact hM_pos.le
    · have hgy_pos : 0 < |g y| := (abs_nonneg (g y)).lt_of_ne (Ne.symm hgy)
      apply (le_div_iff₀ hgy_pos).mp
      apply ciSup_le
      intro x
      apply (le_div_iff₀ hgy_pos).mpr
      exact hg_le x
  exact (mul_le_iff_le_one_right hM_pos).mp hMg
successful_attempts:
intro y
  let M := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hM_bdd : BddAbove (Set.range fun x => |f x|) := ⟨1, Set.forall_mem_range.mpr h₂⟩

    exact (abs_pos.mpr hz).trans_le (le_ciSup hM_bdd z)
  have hg_le : ∀ x, |f x| * |g y| ≤ M := fun x => by
